title: Unreal Engine/C++ Inženieris (Core komanda) / Unreal Engine/C++ Engineer (Core team)
location: Skanstes iela 52, Vidzemes priekšpilsēta, Rīga, LV-1013

summary.lv: Evolution Latvia meklē Unreal Engine/C++ inženieri pamata komandai, kurš izstrādās koplietotas C++ bibliotēkas un spraudņus, kas tiek izmantoti visos projektos. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €4500–8000 mēnesī.
summary.en: Evolution Latvia seeks an Unreal Engine/C++ Engineer for the Core team to build and maintain shared C++ foundations and plugins used across all virtual production studio projects, offering €4,500–8,000/month.
